Detail__c: Dr. Morita expressed significant concerns about Immunexis safety in his elderly patient population (65+ years). He noted that many of his elderly patients have multiple comorbidities and are on multiple medications, which could increase the risk of drug interactions and adverse events. He wants more safety data specifically for this demographic.

Dr. Morita emphasized the need for comprehensive long-term safety data beyond the current clinical trial period. He mentioned that many of his patients will be on Immunexis for years, and he needs reassurance about safety over extended treatment periods, particularly regarding infection risk and malignancy potential.

Dr. Morita has observed increased infection rates in some of his patients on Immunexis, particularly upper respiratory infections and urinary tract infections. He wants detailed data on infection risk stratification and whether certain patient populations are at higher risk.

Summary__c: Positive safety experience in select patients
Detail__c: Dr. Morita reported that in his younger patients (under 50) without comorbidities, Immunexis has shown an excellent safety profile with minimal side effects. He believes patient selection is crucial for safety outcomes and wants guidelines for identifying low-risk patients.

Dr. Morita suggested developing a comprehensive monitoring protocol for patients on Immunexis, including regular lab work, infection screening, and cardiovascular monitoring. He believes proactive monitoring could help identify safety issues early and improve patient outcomes.

Dr. Morita raised concerns about potential drug interactions between Immunexis and commonly prescribed medications in his RA population, particularly with methotrexate, NSAIDs, and cardiovascular medications. He wants a comprehensive drug interaction database.

Dr. Morita has several female patients of childbearing age and wants clear guidance on Immunexis safety during pregnancy and lactation. He noted that current data is limited and he needs more information to counsel these patients appropriately.

Dr. Morita expressed interest in cardiovascular safety data, particularly for patients with pre-existing heart conditions. He mentioned that some of his patients have reported palpitations and wants to understand if this is related to Immunexis treatment.
